import io
import string
import list

fn unwrap_int(_ opt: Option<Int>, _ default: Int) -> Int
  match opt
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    default
  end
end

fn unwrap_str(_ opt: Option<String>) -> String
  match opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn is_space(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
end

fn flush_token(_ acc: List<Int>, _ token: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(token)
    acc
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(acc, v)
    when None
      acc
    end
  end
end

fn parse_tokens(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = unwrap_int(string.byte_at(s, i), 0)
    if is_space(b)
      result = flush_token(result, current)
      current = ""
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result = flush_token(result, current)
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      out = list.push(out, unwrap_int(xs.get(i), 0))
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut best = 0
  mut best_val = unwrap_int(xs.get(0), 0)
  mut i = 1
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = unwrap_int(xs.get(i), 0)
    if v > best_val
      best_val = v
      best = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = unwrap_str(io.read_line())
  let line2 = unwrap_str(io.read_line())
  let nums = parse_tokens(line1)
  let k_raw = unwrap_int(string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)), 0)
  let total = nums.len()
  mut k = k_raw
  if k > total
    k = total
  end
  if k < 0
    k = 0
  end

  mut remaining = nums
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < k
    let idx = max_index(remaining)
    let v = unwrap_int(remaining.get(idx), 0)
    if i == 0
      result = "#{v}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{v}"
    end
    remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
